privileged_info_summary: The employee_performance.csv dataset contains exactly 1000 rows of synthetic employee data (plus 1 header row) with 12 columns: ID, Name, Age, Gender, Department, Salary, Joining Date, Performance Score, Experience, Status, Location, and Session. All columns specified in the task description are present and verified. The data is synthetic with realistic but randomly generated employee names, sequential ID numbers from 1-1000, three departments (HR, IT, Sales), three gender categories (Female, Male, Other), two status types (Active, Inactive), three locations (Chicago, Los Angeles, New York), and three session types (Evening, Morning, Night). Joining dates span from 2014-12-11 to 2024-12-07. The Performance Score column contains numeric values but has 498 missing values (49.8%). The file is copied from the environment's /workspace/data/ directory to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\ during task setup. The task runs on Windows 11 with Power BI Desktop installed.
